title: Spicy Thai Noodle Dish
description: A quick and flavorful noodle dish made with a spicy and sour Thai-inspired sauce. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and 1 cup of water to the skillet.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced fresh cilantro and chili peppers if desired.
Note: If using chili peppers, adjust the level of heat to your liking.
